message:
The other day, as I was rummaging through our go-bags (you know, the ones I’d sworn I’d get to eventually), my phone buzzed with a flurry of messages in our family group chat. It was a silly debate over whether we should include extra snacks or more water in our emergency kits—who knew preparedness could spark such passionate discussions? 😄 

It was a lighthearted reminder that being ready doesn’t have to be all serious business. We shared laughs, exchanged ideas, and, more importantly, we were all on the same page about what we’d do in case of an emergency. 

This little refresher helped spark some fun conversations about our family plans, too! How does your family stay connected about being prepared?
